title: cyrtoceras micranthum
intro: Cyrtoceras micranthum, also known as the 'small-flowered Cyrtoceras', is a plant species in the family Orchidaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its bioactive compounds. Cyrtoceras micranthum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal use.
